_description: SC-PPO threshold sweep diagnostic (#58). Tests thresholds 3.6/3.7/4.0 against baseline 3.8 on seeds {23,29,31} to find whether seed29 failure is threshold-specific. Only the threshold value differs from the #51 extended-seeds 3.8 config; all other parameters are held constant.
name: rough_terrain_threshold_sweep_diagnostic
_diagnostic_scope: Does NOT replace the #51 five-seed record. If any threshold passes all gates, a full {11,17,23,29,31} rerun is required before any replacement claim.

_promotion_gates.seed29_must: recover at least half the smoothness gap to the heuristic seed29 (jnt_acc <= 172.7) while preserving task floor (fall <= 0.600, vel_err <= 0.684)
_promotion_gates.seed31_must: not regress beyond guard band from #51 SC-PPO seed31 (jnt_acc <= 125.8, fall <= 0.050, vel_err <= 0.479)
_promotion_gates.seed23_must: preserve canonical final-checkpoint within guard band (jnt_acc <= 126.8, fall <= 0.150, vel_err <= 0.711)

_next_step_if_pass: Run full {11,17,23,29,31} matrix with the best threshold before making any replacement claim.
_next_step_if_fail: Record negative result, close the threshold lever, do not expand to a broader sweep.
